docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY AUTORETURN AS TO DEFENDANT RAYNOR, RENESHA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-19-2015 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-19-2015 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO SEP-28-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DID NOT STIPULATE FOR PRO TEM JUDGE TO HEAR THIS CASE AT TODAYS HEARING. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GEN MASHIMOTO--QUALITY ASSURANCE DEPARTMENT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $85.00) SERVED JUL-18-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RAYNOR, RENESHA

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-28-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-28-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY GEN MASHIMOTO--QUALITY ASSURANCE DEPARTMENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-28-2015 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AUTORETURN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RAYNOR, RENESHA $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $135.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,635.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
